description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a clean, geometric design and large floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and spacious layout. The exterior is predominantly white with extensive use of glass, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. A small courtyard or garden area is visible, partially enclosed by a fence and featuring some greenery and a parked car. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, enhancing privacy and architectural interest. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with an emphasis on open spaces and functional design.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a minimalist white exterior. Features include a courtyard, garden, and geometric architectural forms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a partially enclosed courtyard with greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage/carport area, garden, and the setback of the upper story.
description_view_2: Rear view with extensive floor-to-ceiling windows and a clear view of the house's geometric layout.
description_view_3: Back corner view showing the flat roofs, window arrangement, and the overall massing of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no steps, and a partially enclosed courtyard with a fence and greenery.
